name: Freshrss With Postgresql
description:
A free, self-hostable feed aggregator.

Docs: https://freshrss.org/index.html?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  freshrss:
    image: freshrss/freshrss:latest
    environment:
      - CRON_MIN=${CRON_MIN:-1,31}
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-freshrss}
      - POSTGRES_USER=u1051b8b231
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=ec43cbfd276b5d3e994bb240e2959896
      - POSTGRES_HOST=freshrss-db
    volumes:
      - freshrss-data:/var/www/FreshRSS/data
      - freshrss-extensions:/var/www/FreshRSS/extensions
    depends_on:
      freshrss-db:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - bash -c ':> /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/80' || exit 1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42039:80
  freshrss-db:
    image: postgres:16
    volumes:
      - freshrss-postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u1051b8b231
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=ec43cbfd276b5d3e994bb240e2959896
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-freshrss}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv3f89d083} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-freshrss_with_postgresql}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  freshrss-data: null
  freshrss-extensions: null
  freshrss-postgresql-data: null
